meaning: n.杰出人物统治论,高人一等的优越感
examples: Many people believe that private education encourages elitism.
It became difficult to promote conventional ideas of excellence without being instantly accused of elitism.
Nevertheless, in some of the deeper mineshafts of foreign policy elitism, this odd outlook lives on.
But the elitism, as you call it, I think has to be looked at very carefully.
